headline.zh: Senior Product Engineer · Mobile × Backend × AI Integration
headline.en: Senior Product Engineer · Mobile × Backend × AI Integration

zh: 資深 Product Engineer，10 年以上企業軟體經驗。從 Mobile 工程師成長為 Technical Lead，主導金融、電信、航空、保全、健康、FinTech、Blockchain 等領域之產品規劃、架構設計與團隊帶領。
擅長將商業需求轉化為可落地的系統架構：動態表單 MVVM、REST API、跨平台 App、後端整合及 AI 應用。目前於 Megaforce（MegAi）擔任經理，帶領 4–6 人團隊，負責 PetCaresHub、地端 AI 會議助理等產品。
en: Senior Product Engineer with 10+ years building enterprise software. Progressed from mobile engineer to technical lead, driving product planning, architecture, and team leadership across banking, telecom, aviation, security, healthcare, fintech, and blockchain.

Strong at turning business requirements into shippable architecture: dynamic-form MVVM, REST APIs, cross-platform apps, backend integration, and AI applications. Currently Engineering Manager at Megaforce (MegAi), leading 4–6 engineers on PetCaresHub and an edge AI meeting assistant.

level.zh: 中階（可閱讀技術文件與溝通）
